script_snippet: Have you ever wondered what would happen if you truly put God first in every part of your life for 30 days?
hero_subject: The protagonist (30s, wearing a fitted navy bomber jacket over a white crew-neck t-shirt, slim dark jeans, simple sneakers) physically arranging a large 30-day calendar where each day is a small glowing Bible, placing the first day's Bible at the top with intentional care.
image_prompt: a person in a fitted navy bomber jacket over a white crew-neck t-shirt arranging a 30-day calendar of glowing Bibles on a modern kitchen table
negative_prompt: cluttered background, cartoonish, anachronistic objects, visible text on pages
image_basis: high quality digital painting, spiritual conviction, divine light, a person in a fitted navy bomber jacket over a white crew-neck t-shirt arranging a 30-day calendar of glowing Bibles on a modern kitchen table
